scripts.build: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm -r --if-present run build
scripts.deploy: pnpm --filter @workspace/db run push-force && pnpm -r build && mkdir -p artifacts/api-server/client && cp -r artifacts/doce-site/dist/public/* artifacts/api-server/client/
scripts.typecheck: pnpm run typecheck:libs && pnpm -r --filter "./artifacts/**" --filter "./scripts" --if-present run typecheck
